understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` by moving horizontally and falling under gravity, while avoiding spike tiles (`u`/`v`) that instantly end the run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is strictly horizontal via MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT, after which gravity automatically pulls the player until landing on a solid tile, hazard, or goal. CLICK removes breakable `x` blocks at a target [x,y] to open paths. Gravity direction (DOWN or UP) determines fall direction; y increases downward. Each level grants 2 attempts of 50 turns. UNDO reverts the prior action. The player must plan horizontal moves so the resulting landing avoids spikes and aligns with passages or the goal.
